waiting_for: LIMIT order fill at EMA21 (29996.42) for long entry; price pulled back to within 2.6 pts of EMA21 as anticipated

long_assessment.reasoning: Price has pulled back to within 2.58 pts of EMA21 (29996.42) as anticipated in prior analysis. EMA structure remains strongly bullish (EMA21 > EMA75 > EMA150). Stochastic at 62.67 shows ample room before overbought. The 30000 psychological level sits just 1 pt above current price and 3.6 pts above entry — a break/retest adds confluence. Targeting 30100 major psychological level (30095 after 5pt buffer) yields 98.6 pt reward vs 39.5 pt risk (stop 10 pts below EMA150 at 29966.90). R/R 2.49:1 exceeds 1.3 minimum. Resting LIMIT at EMA21 captures the pullback entry without requiring confirmation candle.

short_assessment.reasoning: No viable short setup. Nearest bullish FVG below (29950.25-29966.75) is 43.75 pts away — too distant for acceptable R/R on a counter-trend fill trade. EMA alignment is strongly bullish, stochastic is not overbought (62.67), and price is holding above the 30000 psychological level. Shorting into a healthy uptrend pullback lacks confluence and violates trend-following discipline.
